model_family.channel_A: Raw S_i = P_ext/P_model; global S; parametric log10 S(A,Z) and log10 S(R) with leave-one-out
model_family.channel_B: Self-consistent V_WS+V_C ell=0 eigenmode on [0,R], Dirichlet BC, V0 so E0=Q_alpha; throat weight w=R/r; overlap with u_in = r j_0(pi r/R)
model_family.P_definition: |∫ u_in u_alpha w dr|^2 / (∫ u_in^2 w · ∫ u_alpha^2 w) on [0,R]
model_family.scope: RC1 geometric/structural proxies and parametric S — not uniqueness of many-body preformation

flat_gaussian.scope_note: Weighted standing-wave overlap on the confined throat [0,R] with AdS-like measure w=R/r (companion metric √g_rr) and/or flat dr; alpha trial is Woods-Saxon (primary) or Gaussian comparison. Not a first-principles many-body uniqueness claim.

throat_ws.scope_note: Weighted standing-wave overlap on the confined throat [0,R] with AdS-like measure w=R/r (companion metric √g_rr) and/or flat dr; alpha trial is Woods-Saxon (primary) or Gaussian comparison. Not a first-principles many-body uniqueness claim.

channel_A_isotope_S_on_throat_ws.note_tautology: Per-isotope S_i zeros that isotope's residual on the rate / log10-P scale by construction; use parametric + LOO for predictive assessment.

parametric_S_AZ.form: log10 S = b0 + b1 A + b2 Z

summary.scope_note: Self-consistent WS+Coulomb ell=0 eigenmode on [0,R] with Dirichlet BCs; V0 fitted so E0=Q_alpha. Throat weight w=R/r. Box-resonance surrogate — not a complex Gamow eigenphase claim.

summary.scope_note: Self-consistent WS+Coulomb ell=0 eigenmode on [0,b] with Robin outgoing WKB match at r=b; V0 fitted so E0=Q_alpha. Overlap support remains [0,R] with throat weight. Quasistationary outgoing surrogate — not a complex pole search.

comparison_channels.note: Per-isotope S_i is excluded from the winner (tautological). Parametric S judged by leave-one-out RMS on log10 P; eigenmode judged by RMS after one global S.
